since_last: 42% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.41%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC +2.15% · Gold -0.51% · Nasdaq100 -0.22%. 42% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.41%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.41%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +18.43%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +18.43%, VRT +6.17%, MU +5.50%, INTC +4.67%, PWR +4.67%. Laggards: SPCX -10.21%, AVAV -9.61%, ARM -6.80%, PLTR -5.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.21% at $166.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
